meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Setup to Fix No Version Control
content.seo_description: Master version control as a student. Use this intermediate checklist to integrate Claude Code and Antigravity, ensuring your AI projects remain professional.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the 'it worked on my machine' syndrome by integrating Claude Code with Git. By automating your commit cycles and leveraging Antigravity for architectural oversight, you transform chaotic code dumps into a structured, professional-grade portfolio. This workflow ensures every experimental AI iteration is safely versioned and instantly reproducible.
content.intro:
You’ve spent days crafting the perfect AI agent, only to realize you’ve overwritten your best logic with a failed experiment. The crushing silence of a lost codebase is a rite of passage for every student, but it’s a bottleneck you can no longer afford. Professional engineering isn't just about writing code; it's about mastering the state of your project.

Today, we pivot. We are moving from 'coding in the dark' to building with systemic precision. By integrating Claude Code into your workflow, you gain an autonomous partner that treats version control as a first-class citizen, turning your project folder into a robust, history-backed portfolio piece.

steps.title: Initialize Git with Structural Intent
steps.description: Before writing code, establish a clean repository baseline to ensure all subsequent changes are tracked.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional .gitignore template for a Node.js/Python AI project, including sensitive environment variables and build artifacts.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Repository Access
steps.description: Grant Claude Code the necessary permissions to read your git history and suggest atomic commits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: How do I configure Claude Code to automatically detect my git branch and suggest commit messages based on changes?

steps.title: Establish Atomic Commit Cycles
steps.description: Break your development into logical, small chunks that Claude can track effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current working directory and propose a plan to refactor this feature into three distinct, version-controlled steps.

steps.title: Automate Branching for AI Experiments
steps.description: Use branches to isolate experimental AI features from your stable production code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a workflow strategy for managing feature branches when testing different LLM prompts in my codebase.

steps.title: Perform Automated Code Reviews
steps.description: Use Claude Code to review your own PRs before merging to ensure code quality and version integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my latest commit for potential bugs, security vulnerabilities, and adherence to clean code principles.

pro_tips: Always use conventional commits (feat:, fix:, chore:) to make your Git history readable by recruiters.
Use 'claude status' frequently to ensure the agent understands the current state of your git index.
Never commit API keys; use Claude to verify your .gitignore before every push.
Create a 'docs' folder and ask Claude to auto-generate a README.md based on your commit history.
Use git tags for major project milestones; it makes your portfolio look 10x more professional.
content.next_steps: Once your version control is locked, start integrating CI/CD pipelines to deploy your AI agents automatically whenever you push to the main branch.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an engineer building systems that last. Stop losing your work and start building a legacy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
